hero.title: Cut the silence.
hero.subtitle: Keep the content.
hero.description: Jeda automatically detects and removes silent sections from your videos. —within seconds.

features.title: Everything you need to edit faster
features.description: Powerful features designed to streamline your video editing workflow.

items.title: Silence Detection
items.description: Automatically detect silent sections with adjustable sensitivity.

items.title: Visual Timeline
items.description: See waveform visualization with highlighted silence regions.

items.title: Adjustable Cuts
items.description: Drag cut points to fine-tune each silence region.

items.title: Jump Playback
items.description: Preview the final cut result by skipping silence during playback.

items.title: Render Range
items.description: Choose which portion of the video to process with range sliders.

items.title: Export with FFmpeg
items.description: Cut video using FFmpeg bundled with the app for reliable processing.

presets.title: Smart detection presets
presets.description: Choose from pre-configured detection settings optimized for different video types, or customize your own parameters for precise control.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts for speed
shortcuts.description: Work faster with intuitive keyboard shortcuts

download.title: Ready to speed up your workflow?
download.description: Download Jeda free and start creating tighter, more engaging videos in minutes.
